key.query: SMWS RW6.5 official Sauna Smoke Scotch Malt Whisky Society

emittedEvidence.query: SMWS RW6.5 official Sauna Smoke Scotch Malt Whisky Society
emittedEvidence.summary:
The **official SMWS bottle is not “Sauna Smoke” for RW6.5**.  
For **SMWS RW6.5**, the official release name is **“Appley ever after.”** The official SMWS listing confirms **cask no. RW6.5**, **ABV 56.0%**, **age 6 years**, **distilled 11 January 2018**, **cask type 1st fill #3 char barrel**, **spirit type rye whisky**, and **region Finland**. ([smws.com](https://smws.com/appley-ever-after/?utm_source=openai))

An independent non-retailer source, Whiskybase, matches those same release traits and additionally identifies the **distillery as Kyrö Distillery Company**, the **bottler as The Scotch
